title: US arbitration giant rolls out ‘legal layer’ for agentic commerce
summary: As agentic AI transactions increase, “we need to know there’s a clear answer to what happens if something goes wrong,” said Mance Harmon, co-founder of Hedera.

title: House Democrats seek SEC answers on AI investment advisers
summary: House Democrats have questioned the SEC over trading platforms offering AI agent advisers making “consequential investment decisions on behalf of retail investors.”

title: EasyJet Leaves Door Open After Rejecting Latest Castlelake Bid
summary: EasyJet Plc rejected a fourth bid by Castlelake LP that values the UK discount carrier at about £4.93 billion ($6.5 billion), while granting the investment firm more time to come back with another higher offer, in a sign that its opposition to a takeover might be waning.

title: H&M Profit Misses Estimates as Turnaround Questions Persist
summary: H&M AB reported weaker-than-expected second-quarter earnings, posing a fresh challenge to the Swedish fast-fashion retailer’s turnaround efforts amid intense competition and cautious consumer spending.

title: Aave Token Could Climb 50x by End of 2030, Standard Chartered Says—Here's Why
summary: Bitcoin to $500K, Ethereum to $40K, and Aave to $3,500 by the end of 2030? Standard Chartered just laid out some bullish price targets.

title: Kalshi Sues Illinois Over New State Tax on Sports-Related Prediction Markets
summary: Illinois is set to institute a new tax on prediction markets next week that would take 15% of gross receipts from sports-related wagers.

title: CoinEx processed $3.8 billion in Iran-linked funds, acting as crypto gateway: TRM Labs
summary: CoinEx has also interacted with terrorist organizations, including the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, and sanctioned Russian entities.

title: Ripple launches RLUSD stablecoin in Japan after regulatory approval
summary: Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin is available through SBI VC Trade for both institutional and retail users in the country.

title: Oil price back at prewar levels as Gulf flows pick up
summary: Brent crude drops below the $72.48 a barrel it traded at in late February before Iran conflict erupted

title: Insurers slash war premiums for Strait of Hormuz ships
summary: Premiums for hull war coverage drop by more than half as ceasefire deal holds
